title: linum tenue subsp. tenue
intro: Linum tenue subsp. tenue, also known as fine-flowered flax or slender flax, is a subspecies of the Linum tenue plant, a flowering plant in the family Linaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Linum tenue subsp. tenue include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be used in herbal salves and creams to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
